title: QPAU Inflatable Kids Punching Bag, 66 Inch Stable Boxing Bag with Boxing Gloves, Punch Bag Dinosaur Toy & Gifts for Boys Girls Age 3-8, Set for Practicing Karate, Taekwondo, MMA
features: Promotes Growth: The simple act of hitting, kicking, and punching this inflatable punching bag helps kids develop balance, strength, and coordination. Your child can reduce tension and develop confidence by using an inflatable punching bag during playtime. Let your children grow alongside this inflatable boxing bag.

Encourage Movement: Were you unsure about how to encourage your children to be active? Did you have a hard time keeping your kids away from television and video games? The inflatable punching bag from QPAU is here to help! This boxing kit can help kids get motivated to exercise.

Nice for Children Ages 3-6: With a total height of 120 cm/48 inches, this product can be tailored for children between the ages of 3-6. Your kids will come up with fun and inventive ways to interact with their inflatable boxing bags because of the adorable dinasour. QPAU dinosaur punching bag would be the great punching toy gift for toddler boys girls.

Ideal for Family Bound: Kids' inflatable punching bags are a terrific addition to your indoor and outdoor play area, making them ideal for family bound. This gives you the ideal setting and window of opportunity to spend quality time with your children at home or even in the backyard! The brand purpose of QPAU is "Inflating family and kids with more joy and love," and we encourage you to spend as much time as you can with your children while they are still young.

Unbeatable Quality: The karate punching bag is made of PVC and uses 0.5mm ticked material to increase its durability and serve you for a longer time. Despite receiving over 10,000 strikes, the kids boxing training set maintains a clean and flawless surface to prevent skin harm. Allowing your children to play with such a safe and beneficial toy leaves you completely no worry.
description: Are your little ones full of energy and looking for a fun way to channel it? Look no further! Introducing QPAU Inflatable Punching Bag from Fight for Love boxing series for kids to live an active and entertained childhood to protect their family. This colorful karate punching bag sizes is 48 inches for kids aged 3 to 8. It's a great size for practicing boxing skills and spend fun time with family. At QPAU we value the safety of the children. This durable blow up punching bag is made from sturdy PVC material, ensuring hours of safe and energetic play for your little champions. To ensure the stability when playing fill the base with water to keep it firmly in place, even during the most enthusiastic punches! With each QPAU kids punching bag, you get a pair of boxing gloves, specially sized for small hands. It's nice for indoor playrooms or even outdoor spaces. Your kids will feel like real boxing champions! QPAU Inflatable Standing Punching Bag for Kids is the ultimate accessory for active playtime and teaching your kids to “Fight for Love”.
